_instructions: For each app, open evidence_url (or search for the real docs if it's missing/broken) and fill in verdict.<field> with one of ('correct', 'incorrect', 'unsure'). Add a one-line correction in verdict_notes.<field> when marking incorrect. Leave a field's verdict as null if you skip it (it will be excluded from scoring, not counted as wrong).

claimed.api_surface: Wrapped by Composio as 99 agent-callable tools (managed via Composio's toolkit catalog for 'attio')
claimed.buildability_verdict: Yes - already an agent toolkit today via Composio

verdict_notes.auth_method: Still only lists OAuth; Attio's primary self-serve method is an API key from Workspace Settings > Developers, which is omitted.
verdict_notes.api_surface: Exact tool count still unverifiable independently.
verdict_notes.has_mcp: Attio has an official MCP server.
verdict_notes.evidence_url: FIXED — now docs.composio.dev/toolkits/attio, a real, relevant Composio toolkit page, not the marketing homepage.

claimed.api_surface: standardized APIs and SDKs for location data and services
claimed.buildability_verdict: Insufficient direct documentation to confirm buildability as a Composio agent toolkit
claimed.blocker: No explicit documentation on authentication, API access model, or developer onboarding

verdict_notes.auth_method: Unchanged — row wasn't reprocessed (web-sourced, no null fields to trigger re-research).
verdict_notes.api_surface: Unchanged — still describes HERE.com's location API, not Twenty CRM.
verdict_notes.buildability_verdict: Unchanged — still honestly flags insufficient docs.
verdict_notes.blocker: Unchanged — accurate description of the failure.
verdict_notes.evidence_url: UNCHANGED / NOT FIXED — still the broken Bing ad-click redirect. This fix only targeted Composio-sourced rows; the ad-link filter fix for web search was written earlier but this row was never re-triggered because it already has non-null fields (wrong ones) so needs_research() skips it. Needs an explicit reset like the Composio rows got.

verdict_notes.blocker: FIXED — now correctly names the 0-tools gap as the blocker instead of falsely saying 'none'.
verdict_notes.evidence_url: FIXED — now docs.composio.dev/toolkits/front instead of the marketing homepage.

claimed.api_surface: Wrapped by Composio as 57 agent-callable tools (managed via Composio's toolkit catalog for 'whatsapp')
claimed.buildability_verdict: Yes - already an agent toolkit today via Composio

verdict_notes.auth_method: Unchanged — oversimplifies WhatsApp's system-user token model as plain OAuth2.
verdict_notes.self_serve_or_gated: UNCHANGED / NOT FIXED — still says self-serve. This is the documented, out-of-scope limitation: self_serve_or_gated is hardcoded to 'self-serve' for every Composio row by definition of Composio's own access model, and doesn't account for the underlying app's real-world gating (Meta Business Verification + template approval for WhatsApp).
verdict_notes.blocker: UNCHANGED / NOT FIXED — still 'none', still misses the real Meta approval gate. Same root cause as self_serve_or_gated above.
verdict_notes.evidence_url: FIXED — now docs.composio.dev/toolkits/whatsapp instead of the consumer WhatsApp Web client URL.

claimed.auth_method: API Key and Secret, Basic Authentication, JSON Web Token (JWT), Digest Authentication (for SIP Trunking)
claimed.api_surface: Vonage provides APIs for Conversations, Messages, Voice, Video, Verify, SIP Trunking, Number Insight, and more, accessible via REST endpoints with granular ACL control
claimed.buildability_verdict: Vonage offers broad, self-serve API access with multiple authentication methods including API keys and JWTs, supporting granular permission control via ACLs, enabling buildability as a Composio agent toolkit

verdict_notes.auth_method: NEW — confirmed correct: Vonage supports API Key+Secret, Basic Auth, JWT (and Digest for SIP Trunking), matching developer.vonage.com exactly.
verdict_notes.self_serve_or_gated: NEW — confirmed correct: API key/secret are generated automatically on account creation, immediately available in the dashboard.
verdict_notes.api_surface: NEW — confirmed correct: matches Vonage's real multi-API surface (Messages, Voice, Video, Verify, SIP Trunking, Number Insight).
verdict_notes.has_mcp: Left null/not claimed by the agent — correctly not guessed.
verdict_notes.buildability_verdict: NEW — reasonable given confirmed self-serve, broad, well-documented API.
verdict_notes.blocker: NEW — correctly left as no fixed blocker.
verdict_notes.evidence_url: NEW — this is a genuine recovery from a total pass-1 failure (JS-rendered page, 0 usable text). This re-run's fetch succeeded and returned real, specific, correct documentation.

claimed.auth_method: API key via Authorization header and environment variable REDUCTO_API_KEY
claimed.api_surface: Endpoints for file upload (/upload), document parsing (/parse), data extraction (/extract), document splitting (/split_document), classification (/classify_document), and editing (/edit_document); SDKs available for Python, Node.js, Go; MCP server integration
